description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular footprint with a low-pitched, multi-faceted gable roof in a muted gray color. The structure is set on a green lawn and is bordered by a wooden deck or porch that runs along the length of the building. The facade is punctuated by a series of evenly spaced, tall rectangular windows, providing a sense of symmetry and rhythm. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a neutral tone, possibly light gray or beige, complementing the roof. The roof's geometry is complex, with multiple angled planes converging at the ridge, giving the building a modern yet understated appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and a single-story layout.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a low-pitched, multi-faceted gray gable roof, symmetrical tall windows, and a wooden deck running along its length.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bungalow, the wooden deck, and a row of tall, evenly spaced windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end of the roof and the depth of the wooden deck, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a similar arrangement of windows and the wooden deck visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other gable end and the deck, with minimal window visibility.
